title: Simple Player Warps
description: A basic and easy-to-use player warp system that lets players set, browse, and teleport to community warps.
body:
A simple plugin that lets players set their own public warps for others to browse and teleport to. Warps optionally costs money to set and can be customized with icons and descriptions.

## Why Use This
Most warp plugins are overcomplicated with categories, ratings, favorites, and a dozen permission nodes. This plugin does one thing: let players set warps and let others teleport to them with a simple and short config.

## Commands

**For Everyone**

```/pwarp``` - Opens the warp browser

```/pwarp <name>``` - Teleports to a warp

**For Warp Owners**

```/pwarp set <warp_name>``` - Creates a warp

```/pwarp delete <warp_name>``` - Removes your warp

```/pwarp description <warp_name> <text>``` - Add a description to your warp

```/pwarp icon <warp_name> <item>``` - Changes the icon of your warp

```/pwarp rename <old_name> <new_name>``` - Rename a warp

## Permissions
```simpleplayerwarps.use``` - Opens the warp menu and teleport to warps

```simpleplayerwarps.set``` - Sets a warp

```simpleplayerwarps.delete``` - Deletes a warp

```simpleplayerwarps.icon``` - Change the icon for the warp

```simpleplayerwarps.rename``` - Rename a warp

```simpleplayerwarps.description``` - Change the description of a warp

## Requirements/Dependencies
- Essentials (Required)
- GriefPrevention (Optional)
- WorldGuard (Optional)
